findings.description: Benny Raphael Taylor married again after his 1945 marriage: his later wife was Rosemarie Graham (born 1942 in Portland, Oregon; daughter of Arthur L Graham and Rosamund Hoover), married 28 September 1962 in Oregon. This marriage is not in the starting tree — it is recoverable from Benny's 1962 Oregon marriage record and his 1991 Oregon death index entry (surviving spouse 'Rosema Taylor').
supporting_sources: Oregon, Marriage Records, 1906-1968 (ark 1:1:WBF8-1Q3Z) — Benny Rapheal Taylor married 28 Sep 1962; bride Rosemarie Graham, b. 1942 Portland, parents Arthur L Graham and Rosamund Hoover. NOTE: the index title reads 'Benny Rapheal Taylor and Tossie Bain', but 'Tossie Bain' is Benny's MOTHER (Autossie 'Tossie' Bair) listed as his parent on the record, not the bride.
Oregon, Death Index, 1903-1998 (ark 1:1:VZCQ-5XC) — Benny Rapheal Taylor d. 9 Jul 1991, Tillamook, Oregon; surviving spouse 'Rosema Taylor'.
